name.ja: <ruby>大<rt>たい</rt></ruby><ruby>海<rt>かい</rt></ruby>の<ruby>伝<rt>でん</rt></ruby><ruby>説<rt>せつ</rt></ruby>－フィッシャーマン

text.en: If your opponent activates a monster effect on the field (except during the Damage Step), or when their monster declares an attack, and "Umi" or a card that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" other than "Fisherman of Legend" is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy it, also return this card from the field to the hand during the End Phase of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Fisherman of Legend" once per turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的①②效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：对手发动场上的怪兽的效果的情况下，或对手怪兽攻击宣言时，如果场上存在除“大海的传说－渔夫”以外的、记载有“时间黑魔术师”卡名的卡或“海”则可以发动。从手牌将此卡特殊召唤。②：此卡特殊召唤的情况下，以对手场上的1只怪兽为对象可以发动。将该怪兽破坏。在此回合的结束阶段，场上的此卡将回到手牌。
